title: lapathum verticillatum
intro: Lapathum verticillatum, also known as lesser meadow-sweet, is a type of flowering plant in the family Polygonaceae. It is a perennial herb that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of lapathum verticillatum include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and treating skin conditions, such as eczema and acne. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for its medicinal purposes, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its effects.
